item.title: Notes on the Kafka Summit London 2018
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
These are some notes and takeôÙaways on the reôÙcentôÙly celôÙeôÙbratôÙed KafôÙka SumôÙmit 2018 in LonôÙdon.

The conôÙferôÙence was orôÙgaôÙnized in three parôÙalôÙlel tracks for sesôÙsions that were covôÙerôÙing stream proôÙcessôÙing, pipeliôÙnes, and inôÙterôÙnalôÙs. To get a good exôÙpeôÙriôÙence, I atôÙtendôÙed talks of the three typeôÙs, but with a litôÙtle prefôÙerôÙence toôÙwards inôÙterôÙnals and streamôÙs.

It was a two-ôÙday conôÙferôÙence with lots of valuôÙable techôÙniôÙcal conôÙtent, aweôÙsome talkôÙs, speakôÙerôÙs, and a lot more. Here are the highôÙlightôÙs.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 1 minutos de lectura)
